public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as river pilot.
manner: Thinks in movement, timing, and obstacle management, treating delay as a concrete threat. In Sheresh Communes, that reads as someone curious, controlled, and alert to magical contamination, speaking like someone used to careful containment, and the habits of a river pilot still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of river pilot in and around Aurora Meadows Domeway, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Aurora Meadows Domeway workable through the obligations of river pilot while managing the immediate pressure of contamination strain in Sheresh Communes.
hidden_pressure: Must keep movement possible despite weather, chokepoints, rumor, and shifting authority. Around Aurora Meadows Domeway, that usually means carrying contamination strain, calendar contradiction, tundra hazard without letting the role of river pilot visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Sylvi Snowveil can pull the party into chokepoints, timing failures, or rival claims over how movement should happen.
Sylvi Snowveil will share route intelligence, hidden timing, or safer alternatives if the party proves useful under travel pressure.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Travel kit, route marks, and timing-focused movement signal that Sylvi Snowveil lives by roads, passages, or convoy rhythm.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Aurora Meadows Domeway: roads, caravan nodes, docks, ferries, route desks, or loading seams
who_avoids_them: those who do not respect route discipline
